---
title: "🎮 Data Science Playground"
subtitle: "Interactive Coding Experiments"
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!00_playground.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "title"
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  grid-columns: 2
format: html
---

Welcome to the **Data Science Playground**! 🚀

Here you'll find interactive demonstrations showcasing the exciting world of data science. Each experiment includes:

- **Live Python/R code** you can run in your browser
- **Real datasets** to explore and analyze
- **Visualizations** that bring data to life
- **Detailed explanations** of concepts and techniques

These demonstrations give you a taste of what you'll learn in CMPSC 301. Play around, experiment, and see what data science is all about!

---

## 🎯 What You'll Explore

:::{.callout-tip}
## Try It Live!
Each demonstration includes interactive code cells. Click the **JupyterLite** tab in the navigation to access a full Python/R environment, or use the embedded code runners below!
:::

:::{.callout-note}
## For Prospective Students
These demonstrations showcase the types of projects and analyses you'll create in this course. Don't worry if some concepts are unfamiliar - that's what the course is for! The goal is to inspire curiosity and show you the possibilities.
:::

---

## 🌟 Featured Demonstrations

Browse the demonstrations below to see data science in action:
